description: Account of building operations ca. 1216. Expenditures for construction materials and labor, as recorded in the course of several days. The work is done at compounds of the qodesh and the Synagogue of the Palestinians. Some other expenditures, as for captives, are also included. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 412 #113)
tags: qodesh, waqf, Coptic numerals, 13th c, communal, account
description_he: חשבון עבודות בנייה, בערך 1216. הוצאות לחומרי בנייה ועבודה במשך מספר ימים, בחצרות הקודש ובבית הכנסת של הארץ ישראלים.
